name: Tee Time 2
address: 4013 Hwy 17 S, North Myrtle Beach, SC 29582
about: Tee Time 2 is a Myrtle Beach-based mobile golf simulator business owned by a veteran. They deliver a portable golf simulator system to client locations for events and gatherings. The service includes professional setup, on-site assistance, and access to over 1,200 virtual golf courses. They offer a variety of packages for different event lengths, including 4, 6, and 8-hour options. The experience is designed to be a versatile entertainment solution suitable for corporate events, private parties, and charity gatherings, with a focus on creating a memorable and immersive activity regardless of weather.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient mobile service that brings the golf experience to any location
High-tech swing analyzer providing detailed metrics on path, face angle, and club sweet spot
Access to over 1,000 championship golf courses worldwide
Flexible packages suitable for various event types and durations
All-inclusive service with on-site 'Caddie' to manage everything

food_and_drink.notes: Catering, food trucks, and grill masters are available optional add-ons
No mention of on-site alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, a complete set of left and right-handed clubs is included with every rental. You are also welcome to use your own unmarked golf balls and clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: While food and drink options can be arranged through their add-on services (catering, food truck, grill master), it is not explicitly stated whether guests can bring their own food and beverages. The service is brought to your location, so personal items would typically be permitted at the host's discretion.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes depends on the pace of play and the number of players, which is not specified. The packages are sold in blocks of continuous play time (4, 6, or 8 hours), with a 'Caddie' on-site to manage the software and keep score.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Time 2 is marketed as a family-friendly experience suitable for all skill levels. It is listed among the 'most popular parties' for school events and graduation parties, and the service is promoted as an activity for 'guests of all skill levels' to ensure everyone can participate and have fun.
